$comment: Compiler performance options injected into QueryOptions at runtime. Kept separate from the base graph_query.schema.json to reduce token usage for LLM consumers.

skip_dedup.description: Skip ReplacingMergeTree deduplication. Not allowed for aggregation queries.

materialize_ctes.description: Materialize multi-referenced CTEs for reduced redundant scans.

use_semi_join.description: Rewrite IN-subquery SIP patterns to LEFT SEMI JOIN.
